'''Landing platform Nilat-3''' was one of the many landing platforms on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The [[Jin'ha]] used this platform when [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] weapons to the criminal organization [[Black Heth]], an act that was [[Skirmishes on Coruscant|interrupted]] by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

==Behind the scenes==
Landing platform Nilat-3 appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']].
